title: Professional Chef Course
titleBn: Become proficient in the art of professional kitchens
headline: Become proficient in the art of professional kitchens.
subHeadline: This intensive 3-month program is our flagship course, designed for those who want to build senior roles in 4-star hotels or international careers.

modules.title: Fundamental Knife Skills
modules.description: Perfect cuts and complete control over kitchen safety.

modules.title: Global Cuisine Mastery
modules.description: In-depth training on Continental, Arabian, and Pan-Asian cuisines.

modules.title: The Big 5 Specialized
modules.description: Professional techniques for pizza, burgers, pasta, sandwiches, and baking.

modules.title: Kitchen Management
modules.description: Kitchen SOPs, food costing, inventory, and hygiene (HACCP) concepts.

modules.title: Language & Soft Skills
modules.description: Integrated English and foreign language training for global careers.

highlights.label: Internship
highlights.description: Guaranteed 3-month internship at Pan Pacific Sonargaon, InterContinental, and Radisson Blu.

highlights.label: Job Guarantee
highlights.description: 100% placement assistance after successful course completion.

highlights.label: Career Path
highlights.description: Executive Chef, Sous Chef, or International Catering Lead.

title: Basic Short Professional Chef Course
titleBn: Make your culinary skills more dynamic
headline: Make your culinary skills more dynamic.
subHeadline: This 30-day course is for new entrepreneurs, hobbyist cooks, or those who want to start an entry-level career quickly.

modules.title: Essential Culinary Techniques
modules.description: Basic concepts of heat control, seasoning, and using professional equipment.

modules.title: Commercial Fast Food Mastery
modules.description: High-speed preparation techniques for pasta, pizza, and gourmet sandwiches.

modules.title: Traditional Catering Basics
modules.description: Foundations of Biryani and local commercial catering.

modules.title: Hygiene & Presentation
modules.description: Food safety standards and the aesthetics of professional plating.

highlights.label: Efficiency
highlights.description: Acquire skills equivalent to months of training in just 30 days.

highlights.label: Entrepreneurial Focus
highlights.description: Ideal if you want to start a cloud kitchen or small restaurant.

highlights.label: Skill Certification
highlights.description: Collect a professional certificate to prove your skills and join the workforce quickly.
